## System Description

{{ system_name }} uses AgentGuard MCP to enforce NIST 800-53 Rev 5 controls
on all AI agent tool calls. AgentGuard operates as a transparent proxy between
AI clients and MCP servers, providing:

- Hash-chained audit logging (AU-2, AU-3, AU-9, AU-10, AU-12)
- Policy-based access enforcement (AC-3, AC-6)
- Prompt injection detection (SI-4, SI-10)
- PII and secret detection (SI-10, SC-28, SC-8)
- Tool poisoning detection (SI-4, SI-10)
